query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `coaching_sessions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `crdts` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `agentCode` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `alias` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `sessionDate` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `cycleKey` varchar(7) NOT NULL,
  `coachingHours` decimal(8,2) DEFAULT '0.00',
  `bonusAmount` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT '0.00',
  `sessionType` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `status` enum('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `uploadedAt` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_coaching_crdts` (`crdts`),
  KEY `idx_coaching_cycle` (`cycleKey`)
);
